items.name: Pink Eye
items.description: All the beauty of pink. All the nastiness of an eye.

items.name: Emerald Eye
items.description: Here's looking at you, kid.

items.name: Dangerous Eye Patch
items.description: Danger everywhere you stare.

items.name: Overseer's Eye
items.description: You must kill him to become him.

items.name: Sapphire Eye
items.description: Without one, you can't see what the big fuss is about.

items.name: Ruby Eye
items.description: Posterboy for the eye moisturizer movement.

items.name: The Hematite Eye
items.description: One night the hematite knight will come for you, and it won't be a good night!

items.name: Platinum Eye
items.description: What do you see with your platinum eye? Unlimited opportunity.

items.name: Gobble Gobble Googly Eyes
items.description: Giant Googly eyed turkey head

items.name: Googly Eye Shark Hat
items.description: We found the shark!! RIP your surfboard

items.name: Fried Egg Eye Patch
items.description: I like it because it matches my bacon tie!

items.name: Eyes of the Overworld
items.description: A mysterious synod of 47-dimensional beings contracts these spies to monitor the events of our flat universe.

items.name: Futurevision Eye Patch
items.description: I can see your future.  And it's bright. Bright pink.

items.name: Warrior of the Third Eye
items.description: War is not winning or losing, it is both at the same time.  He knows this, and fights on.

items.name: Slimy Eye Ball Top Hat
items.description: The grossest top hat on ROBLOX? Eye think so!

items.name: Eye Snake Shades
items.description: He doesn't have snake eyes, he's got eye snakes.

items.name: Shinestone Eyes: Emerald Extreme
items.description: These aren't just over the top, they're above and beyond it.

items.name: Shinestone Eyes: Sapphire Sass
items.description: No shades can possibly dampen your shine in these.

items.name: Shinestone Eyes: Ruby Radiance
items.description: When rose-colored glasses don't go far enough.

items.name: Spiderweb Smokey Eyes
items.description: Caught in the web and not even trying to escape. Dark, dramatic, and a little bit haunted.

items.name: Celestial Eyes
items.description: Gold stars, a crescent moon, and a shimmer that says you don't belong to this planet.

items.name: Green Glowing Eyes
items.description: You're watching Netflix videos- just chillin' on a typical Friday night. You hear a sound. You look out the window. You see these green glowing eyes and nothing else.  You go outside to inspect the situation. You approach the figure. It is your best friend. He bought this face just to mess with you. Friends are weird.

items.name: Mermaid Eyes
items.description: Iridescent scales, a soft pink lip, and a glow that looks like you just surfaced from somewhere magical. Land-dwellers could never.

items.name: Main Character Eyes
items.description: Golden eyes, red lip, clean brows. No extras needed — you already have the part.

items.name: Smoke & Velvet Eyes
items.description: Dark smoky eyes, a bold red lip, and just enough sparkle to catch the light. For nights that start late and end never.

items.name: Y2K Dream Eyes
items.description: Hot pink lips, blue-violet eyes, and a butterfly that landed and decided to stay. Early 2000s energy, fully recharged.

items.name: Serious Red Eye Scar
items.description: The world is a dangerous place for your face.

items.name: Cloud Nine Eyes
items.description: Soft lavender streaks and purple lips - the look you get when your head floats past the clouds and keeps going. Why come back down?

items.name: Emerald Evil Eye
items.description: Cyclops are always fighting each other, because they can't see eye to eye.

items.name: Eyes of Azurewrath
items.description: What terrible secrets hide behind those eyes?
